content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.nia.nih.gov/news/research-intermittent-fasting-shows-health-benefits", "source_title": "Research on intermittent fasting shows health benefits", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Still, more research is needed to determine whether intermittent fasting yields benefits or is even feasible for humans when practiced over ...", "direct_quote": "Still, more research is needed to determine whether intermittent fasting yields benefits or is even feasible for humans when practiced over the long term, such as for years.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Intermittent fasting is an eating pattern that includes hours or days of no or minimal food consumption without deprivation of essential nut...", "direct_quote": "Intermittent fasting is an eating pattern that includes hours or days of no or minimal food consumption without deprivation of essential nutrients.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "This activity enhances the body\u2019s defenses against oxidative and metabolic stress and initiates the removal or repair of damaged molecules.", "direct_quote": "This activity enhances the body\u2019s defenses against oxidative and metabolic stress and initiates the removal or repair of damaged molecules.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
